/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   UTILS
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
function fmtUSD(v,d) {
  if (v===null||v===undefined||isNaN(v)) return '—';
  v=+v;
  if (d!==undefined) return '$'+v.toFixed(d);
  const a=Math.abs(v);
  if (a>=10000) return (v<0?'-':'')+'$'+Math.abs(v).toLocaleString('en',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2});
  if (a>=1)     return '$'+v.toFixed(4);
  if (a>=0.01)  return '$'+v.toFixed(5);
  if (a>=0.0001)return '$'+v.toFixed(6);
  return '$'+v.toFixed(8);
}
function fmtPct(v,d=2) { if (v===null||v===undefined||isNaN(v)) return '—%'; return (+v>=0?'+':'')+parseFloat(v).toFixed(d)+'%'; }
function fmtNum(v,d=4)  { if (v===null||v===undefined||isNaN(v)) return '—'; return parseFloat(v).toFixed(d); }
function fmtTime(iso)   {
  if (!iso) return '—';
  try { return new Date(iso).toLocaleString('id-ID',{timeZone:'UTC',year:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit',hour12:false}).replace(',',''); }
  catch(e){return iso.slice(0,19);}
}
function fmtTimeShort(iso) { if (!iso) return '—'; try { return new Date(iso).toISOString().slice(11,19); } catch(e){return '—';} }
function signUSD(v)  { const n=+v; return (n>=0?'+':'')+fmtUSD(n); }
function signPct(v,d=2) { return fmtPct(v,d); }
function colorPnl(v) { const n=+v; if(n>0) return 'pnl-pos'; if(n<0) return 'pnl-neg'; return ''; }
function esc(s) { return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;'); }
function getProfile(sym) { const b=sym.split('/')[0].toUpperCase(); return COIN_PROFILES_MAP[b]||'scalp_volatile'; }
function getProfEmoji(prof) { return PROFILE_EMOJI[prof]||'⚙️'; }
function getCoinIcon(sym)   { const b=sym.split('/')[0].toUpperCase(); return COIN_ICON_CLASS[b]||'ci-def'; }
function setEl(id,v)   { const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.textContent=v; }
function setHTML(id,v) { const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.innerHTML=v; }
function setBar(id,pct){ const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.style.width=Math.min(100,Math.max(0,pct))+'%'; }

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   CLOCK
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
function updateClock() {
  const n=new Date();
  setEl('top-clock',n.getUTCHours().toString().padStart(2,'0')+':'+n.getUTCMinutes().toString().padStart(2,'0')+':'+n.getUTCSeconds().toString().padStart(2,'0')+' UTC');
}
setInterval(updateClock,1000);
updateClock();

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   API — FIX: Semua POST sekarang kirim X-API-Key
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function apiFetch(path, timeout=8000) {
  try {
    const ctrl=new AbortController();
    const tid=setTimeout(()=>ctrl.abort(),timeout);
    const r=await fetch(API_BASE+path,{signal:ctrl.signal});
    clearTimeout(tid);
    if (!r.ok) return null;
    return await r.json();
  } catch(e) { return null; }
}

// FIX KRITIS: apiPost sekarang selalu menyertakan X-API-Key header
async function apiPost(path, body={}, timeout=15000) {
  try {
    const ctrl=new AbortController();
    const tid=setTimeout(()=>ctrl.abort(),timeout);
    const headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'};
    // Tambahkan X-API-Key jika tersedia
    if (DASHBOARD_API_KEY) {
      headers['X-API-Key']=DASHBOARD_API_KEY;
    }
    const r=await fetch(API_BASE+path,{
      method:'POST', signal:ctrl.signal,
      headers, body:JSON.stringify(body)
    });
    clearTimeout(tid);
    // FIX: Tangani 401 dengan pesan yang jelas
    if (r.status===401) {
      showToast('warn','Auth Error','API Key salah atau belum diset. Buka Settings dan isi Dashboard API Key.');
      return null;
    }
    if (!r.ok) return null;
    return await r.json();
  } catch(e) { return null; }
}

function setApiUrl(url) {
  API_BASE=url.replace(/\/$/,'');
  localStorage.setItem('api_base',API_BASE);
}

// FIX: Fungsi baru untuk simpan API key
function setApiKey(key) {
  DASHBOARD_API_KEY=key.trim();
  localStorage.setItem('dashboard_api_key',DASHBOARD_API_KEY);
  if (DASHBOARD_API_KEY) showToast('info','API Key Saved','Dashboard API Key berhasil disimpan.');
}

function setRefreshInterval(ms) {
  REFRESH_MS=parseInt(ms);
  localStorage.setItem('refresh_ms',REFRESH_MS);
  if (S.refreshTimer) clearInterval(S.refreshTimer);
  S.refreshTimer=setInterval(refreshAll,REFRESH_MS);
}

// FIX: testApiConnection sekarang menggunakan path /health yang benar (bukan /api/health)
async function testApiConnection() {
  setEl('cfg-api-status','Testing...');
  // Health endpoint ada di /health, bukan /api/health
  const healthUrl = API_BASE.replace(/\/api\/?$/,'')+'/health';
  try {
    const ctrl=new AbortController();
    setTimeout(()=>ctrl.abort(),4000);
    const r=await fetch(healthUrl,{signal:ctrl.signal});
    if (r.ok) {
      const data=await r.json();
      setEl('cfg-api-status','✅ Connected — '+(data.time||''));
      showToast('buy','Connected','API online ✅ '+healthUrl);
    } else {
      setEl('cfg-api-status','❌ HTTP '+r.status);
      showToast('warn','Error','API response: HTTP '+r.status);
    }
  } catch(e) {
    setEl('cfg-api-status','❌ Tidak dapat terhubung');
    showToast('warn','Offline','API tidak merespons di '+healthUrl);
  }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   NAVIGATION
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
function navigate(page) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.topbar-nav a').forEach(a=>a.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-item').forEach(a=>a.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-item').forEach(a=>a.classList.remove('active'));
  const pg=document.getElementById('page-'+page);
  if (pg) pg.classList.add('active');
  ['nav-','sb-','mob-'].forEach(p=>{const el=document.getElementById(p+page);if(el)el.classList.add('active');});
  S.page=page;
  if (page==='positions') renderPositionsTable();
  if (page==='trades')    renderTrades();
  if (page==='analytics') loadAnalytics();
  if (page==='risk')      renderRiskPage();
  if (page==='watchlist') renderCoinGrid();
  if (page==='settings')  loadSettings();
}

function toggleSidebar() {
  document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('open');
  document.getElementById('sidebar-overlay').classList.toggle('open');
}
function closeSidebar() {
  document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('sidebar-overlay').classList.remove('open');
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   MAIN REFRESH LOOP
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function refreshAll() {
  const snap = await apiFetch('/dashboard_snapshot');
  const health=snap?.system_health;
  const metrics=snap?.metrics;
  const balance=snap?.balance;
  const posData=snap?.positions;
  const status=snap?.status;
  const ecData=snap?.equity_curve;

  const wasOnline=S.apiOnline;
  S.apiOnline=!!(health||metrics||balance);

  if (health)  S.health=health;
  if (metrics) S.metrics=metrics;
  if (balance) S.balance=balance;
  if (posData) S.positions=posData.positions||[];
  if (status)  S.status=status;
  if (ecData&&ecData.curve) S.equityCurve=ecData.curve;

  if (status&&status.watchlist&&status.watchlist.length) {
    S.watchlist=status.watchlist;
    setEl('sb-coin-count',S.watchlist.length);
  }

  const dot=document.getElementById('ws-dot');
  const errB=document.getElementById('api-error-bar');
  if (S.apiOnline) {
    dot.className='ws-dot';
    errB.classList.remove('show');
    document.getElementById('conn-banner').classList.add('hidden');
    S.retryCount=0;
    if (!wasOnline) showToast('buy','Connected','Berhasil terhubung ke API bot ✅');
  } else {
    dot.className='ws-dot dead';
    S.retryCount++;
    errB.classList.add('show');
    setEl('api-error-msg','API offline · Retry #'+S.retryCount+' · '+API_BASE);
    if (S.retryCount===1) {
      document.getElementById('conn-banner').classList.remove('hidden');
      setEl('conn-retry-msg','Retry otomatis...');
    }
    return;
  }

  const tkData=snap?.tickers;
  if (tkData&&tkData.tickers) S.tickers=tkData.tickers;

  const logsData=snap?.logs;
  if (logsData&&logsData.logs) {
    const newLogs=logsData.logs.filter(l=>!S.lastLogs.some(ol=>ol.timestamp===l.timestamp&&ol.message===l.message));
    newLogs.slice(0,5).reverse().forEach(l=>addConsole(l.level,l.module,l.message));
    S.lastLogs=logsData.logs;
  }

  updateDashboard();
  renderTickerTape();

  const np=S.positions.length;
  setEl('sb-pos-badge',np);
  setEl('nav-pos-badge',np>0?'('+np+')':'');
  setEl('mob-pos-count',np>0?np:'');

  if (S.page==='positions') renderPositionsTable();
  if (S.page==='risk')      renderRiskPage();
  const scData = await apiFetch('/intelligence/scores');
  if (scData && scData.scores) {
    scData.scores.forEach(s => { S.scores[s.symbol] = s; });
  }
  if (S.page==='watchlist') renderCoinGrid();
  if (S.page==='settings')  renderSettingsTable?.();
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   DASHBOARD
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
function updateDashboard() {
  const h=S.health||{};
  const m=S.metrics||{};
  const b=S.balance||{};

  const eq=h.current_equity||b.total_equity||0;
  const fb=h.free_balance||b.free_balance||0;
  const dpnl=b.daily_pnl||0;
  const dpct=b.daily_pnl_pct||0;
  const openPnl=b.open_pnl||S.positions.reduce((a,p)=>a+(p.unrealized_pnl||0),0);

  setEl('kpi-equity',fmtUSD(eq,2));
  setEl('kpi-free',fmtUSD(fb,2));
  const dpEl=document.getElementById('kpi-daily-dir');
  if (dpEl){dpEl.textContent=signUSD(dpnl);dpEl.className='change '+(dpnl>=0?'up':'down');}
  setEl('kpi-daily-pct','('+signPct(dpct)+')');

  const tp=m.total_pnl||0;
  const tpEl=document.getElementById('kpi-total-pnl');
  if (tpEl){tpEl.textContent=signUSD(tp);tpEl.className='stat-value '+(tp>=0?'green':'red');}
  setEl('kpi-win-rate',fmtNum(m.win_rate_pct,1)+'%');
  setEl('kpi-trades',(m.total_trades||0)+' trades');

  const dd=h.current_drawdown_pct||0;
  const maxdd=m.max_drawdown_pct||0;
  const ddLim=h.max_drawdown_pct||15;
  const mddEl=document.getElementById('kpi-maxdd');
  if (mddEl){mddEl.textContent=fmtNum(maxdd,2)+'%';mddEl.className='stat-value '+(maxdd>10?'red':maxdd>5?'yellow':'');}
  const cddEl=document.getElementById('kpi-curdd');
  if (cddEl){cddEl.textContent=fmtNum(dd,2)+'%';cddEl.className='change '+(dd>7?'down':'');}
  setEl('kpi-dd-limit',ddLim+'%');

  const op=h.open_positions||S.positions.length||0;
  setEl('kpi-open-pos',op);
  const opEl=document.getElementById('kpi-open-pnl');
  if (opEl){opEl.textContent=signUSD(openPnl);opEl.className='change '+(openPnl>=0?'up':'down');}
  setEl('kpi-max-open',h.max_open_positions||3);

  const halted=h.is_halted;
  setEl('h-status',halted?'HALTED':'RUNNING');
  const hstEl=document.getElementById('h-status');
  if (hstEl) hstEl.className='health-value '+(halted?'bad':'ok');
  setEl('h-strategy',h.strategy_name||'VB');
  const latEl=document.getElementById('h-latency');
  if (latEl){const lat=h.avg_api_latency_ms||0;latEl.textContent=fmtNum(lat,1)+' ms';latEl.className='health-value '+(lat>500?'bad':lat>200?'warn':'ok');}
  if (S.status) setEl('h-uptime',S.status.uptime_display||'—');
  setEl('h-peak',fmtUSD(h.peak_equity,2));

  setEl('sb-latency',fmtNum(h.avg_api_latency_ms,1)+' ms');
  setEl('sb-daily-pct',fmtNum(h.daily_loss_pct,2)+'%');
  setEl('sb-dd-pct',fmtNum(dd,2)+'%');
  const dlPct=((h.daily_loss_pct||0)/(h.daily_loss_limit_pct||10)*100);
  const ddPct2=(dd/ddLim*100);
  setBar('sb-daily-bar',dlPct);setBar('sb-dd-bar',ddPct2);
  setBar('h-daily-bar',dlPct);setBar('h-dd-bar2',ddPct2);
  setEl('h-daily-loss-pct',fmtNum(h.daily_loss_pct,2)+'% / '+(h.daily_loss_limit_pct||10)+'%');
  setEl('h-dd-pct',fmtNum(dd,2)+'% / '+ddLim+'%');

  const banner=document.getElementById('halt-banner');
  if (halted){banner.classList.remove('hidden');setEl('halt-reason-text',h.halt_reason||'—');}
  else banner.classList.add('hidden');

  const mb=document.getElementById('mode-badge');
  if (mb){mb.textContent=(h.testnet?'TESTNET':'LIVE');mb.className='mode-badge '+(h.testnet?'testnet':'live');}
  const hmEl=document.getElementById('h-mode');
  if (hmEl){hmEl.textContent=h.testnet?'TESTNET':'LIVE';hmEl.className='health-value '+(h.testnet?'warn':'bad');}

  setEl('m-pf',    m.profit_factor===Infinity?'∞':fmtNum(m.profit_factor,3));
  setEl('m-sharpe',fmtNum(m.sharpe_ratio,4));
  setEl('m-sortino',fmtNum(m.sortino_ratio,4));
  setEl('m-calmar',fmtNum(m.calmar_ratio,4));
  setEl('m-exp',   signUSD(m.expectancy));
  setEl('m-fees',  fmtUSD(m.total_fees,4));
  setEl('m-wl',    fmtNum(m.avg_win_loss_ratio,3));

  renderEquityChart();
  renderDashPositions();

  const fdot=document.getElementById('feed-dot');
  if (fdot) fdot.className='ws-dot '+(S.apiOnline?'':'dead');
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   TICKER TAPE
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
function renderTickerTape() {
  const el=document.getElementById('ticker-inner');
  if (!el) return;
  const items=S.watchlist.map(sym=>{
    const t=S.tickers[sym]||{};
    const price=t.last||0;
    const chg=t.change_pct||0;
    const cls=chg>=0?'up':'down';
    const base=sym.split('/')[0];
    const pStr=price>=1?'$'+price.toFixed(2):price>=0.001?'$'+price.toFixed(5):'$'+price.toFixed(8);
    return `<div class="ticker-item"><span class="ticker-sym">${base}</span><span class="ticker-price">${pStr}</span><span class="ticker-chg ${cls}">${chg>=0?'▲':'▼'} ${Math.abs(chg).toFixed(2)}%</span></div>`;
  }).join('');
  el.innerHTML=items+items;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   DASHBOARD POSITIONS TABLE
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
function renderDashPositions() {
  const tb=document.getElementById('dash-positions-tbody');
  if (!tb) return;
  if (!S.positions.length) {
    tb.innerHTML=`<tr><td colspan="7" style="text-align:center;padding:16px;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:11px">No open positions</td></tr>`;
    return;
  }
  tb.innerHTML=S.positions.map(p=>{
    const pnl=p.unrealized_pnl||0;
    const pct=p.unrealized_pnl_pct||0;
    const prof=extractProfile(p.signal_origin)||getProfile(p.symbol);
    const mode=extractMode(p.signal_origin);
    return `<tr>
      <td class="symbol" onclick="openCoinDrawer('${esc(p.symbol)}')">${esc(p.symbol)}</td>
      <td><span class="profile-chip">${getProfEmoji(prof)} ${esc(prof.replace(/_/g,' '))}</span></td>
      <td>${fmtUSD(p.entry_price)}</td>
      <td class="right">${fmtUSD(p.current_price)}</td>
      <td class="right"><span class="${colorPnl(pnl)}">${signUSD(pnl)}<br><small>${signPct(pct)}</small></span></td>
      <td>${mode?`<span class="exit-mode-badge ${mode.includes('RIDE')?'wave':'quick'}">${mode.replace(/_/g,' ')}</span>`:'—'}</td>
      <td style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px"><span style="color:var(--red)">${fmtUSD(p.stop_loss_price)}</span> / <span style="color:var(--green)">${fmtUSD(p.take_profit_price)}</span></td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   POSITIONS PAGE
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function loadPositions() {
  const data=await apiFetch('/positions');
  if (data) S.positions=data.positions||[];
  renderPositionsTable();
}

function renderPositionsTable() {
  const positions=S.positions;
  const totalPnl=positions.reduce((a,p)=>a+(p.unrealized_pnl||0),0);
  const totalExp=positions.reduce((a,p)=>a+((p.entry_price||0)*(p.amount||0)),0);
  setEl('ps-count',positions.length);
  const ppEl=document.getElementById('ps-open-pnl');
  if (ppEl){ppEl.textContent=signUSD(totalPnl);ppEl.className='stat-value '+(totalPnl>=0?'green':'red');}
  setEl('ps-exposure',fmtUSD(totalExp,2));
  setEl('pos-subtitle',positions.length+' posisi terbuka · Auto-refresh 5s');

  if (positions.length) {
    const avgSecs=positions.reduce((a,p)=>{if(!p.entry_time)return a;return a+(Date.now()-new Date(p.entry_time).getTime())/1000;},0)/positions.length;
    const h=Math.floor(avgSecs/3600),m2=Math.floor((avgSecs%3600)/60);
    setEl('ps-avg-hold',h+'h '+m2+'m');
  } else setEl('ps-avg-hold','—');

  const tb=document.getElementById('positions-tbody');
  if (!tb) return;
  if (!positions.length) {
    tb.innerHTML=`<tr><td colspan="17"><div class="empty-state"><div class="empty-icon">📭</div>No open positions</div></td></tr>`;
    return;
  }
  tb.innerHTML=positions.map(p=>{
    const pnl=p.unrealized_pnl||0;
    const pct=p.unrealized_pnl_pct||0;
    const cost=(p.entry_price||0)*(p.amount||0);
    const prof=extractProfile(p.signal_origin)||getProfile(p.symbol);
    const mode=extractMode(p.signal_origin);
    const closing=p.is_closing;
    const duration=p.duration_display||calcDuration(p.entry_time);
    const beStatus=(p.stop_loss_price&&p.entry_price&&p.stop_loss_price>=p.entry_price)?' ✅BE':'';
    return `<tr>
      <td class="symbol" onclick="openCoinDrawer('${esc(p.symbol)}')">${esc(p.symbol)}</td>
      <td><span class="profile-chip">${getProfEmoji(prof)} ${esc(prof.replace(/_/g,' '))}</span></td>
      <td><span class="side-badge ${p.side||'long'}">${(p.side||'long').toUpperCase()}</span></td>
      <td>${fmtUSD(p.entry_price)}</td>
      <td style="font-size:9.5px;color:var(--text-muted)">${fmtTime(p.entry_time)}</td>
      <td class="right">${fmtUSD(p.current_price)}</td>
      <td class="right">${fmtNum(p.amount,6)}</td>
      <td class="right">${fmtUSD(cost,2)}</td>
      <td class="right"><span class="${colorPnl(pnl)}">${signUSD(pnl)}</span></td>
      <td class="right"><span class="${colorPnl(pct)}">${signPct(pct)}</span></td>
      <td style="color:var(--red);font-size:10px">${fmtUSD(p.stop_loss_price)}${beStatus}</td>
      <td style="color:var(--green);font-size:10px">${fmtUSD(p.take_profit_price)}</td>
      <td style="font-size:10px">${p.atr_at_entry?fmtNum(p.atr_at_entry,5):'—'}</td>
      <td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted)">${esc(duration)}</td>
      <td>${mode?`<span class="exit-mode-badge ${mode.includes('RIDE')?'wave':'quick'}">${mode.replace(/_/g,' ')}</span>`:'—'}</td>
      <td>${closing?'<span class="status-chip closing">CLOSING</span>':'<span class="status-chip open">OPEN</span>'}</td>
      <td class="center"><button class="action-btn" onclick="closePositionConfirm('${esc(p.symbol)}',${p.current_price||0})">Close</button></td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

function calcDuration(entryTime) {
  if (!entryTime) return '—';
  const d=(Date.now()-new Date(entryTime).getTime())/1000;
  const h=Math.floor(d/3600),m=Math.floor((d%3600)/60),s=Math.floor(d%60);
  return `${h.toString().padStart(2,'0')}:${m.toString().padStart(2,'0')}:${s.toString().padStart(2,'0')}`;
}

async function closePositionConfirm(sym,price) {
  if (!confirm(`Tutup posisi ${sym} @ ${fmtUSD(price)}?`)) return;
  showToast('warn','Info','Gunakan Panic Close untuk menutup semua, atau pantau melalui SL/TP.');
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   TRADES PAGE
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function loadTrades() {
  const data=await apiFetch('/trades?limit=200');
  if (data) S.trades=data.trades||[];
  renderTrades();
}

function filterTrades(f,btn) {
  S.tradeFilter=f;
  document.querySelectorAll('#page-trades .filter-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
  renderTrades();
}
function applyTradeFilter() {
  S.tradeSymFilter=(document.getElementById('trade-sym-filter')?.value||'').toLowerCase();
  renderTrades();
}
function sortTrades(key) {
  if (S.tradeSortKey===key) S.tradeSortDir=(S.tradeSortDir==='asc'?'desc':'asc');
  else {S.tradeSortKey=key;S.tradeSortDir='desc';}
  renderTrades();
}

function renderTrades() {
  let trades=[...S.trades];
  if (S.tradeFilter==='wins')   trades=trades.filter(t=>(t.realized_pnl||0)>0);
  if (S.tradeFilter==='losses') trades=trades.filter(t=>(t.realized_pnl||0)<0);
  if (S.tradeFilter==='buy')    trades=trades.filter(t=>t.side==='buy');
  if (S.tradeFilter==='sell')   trades=trades.filter(t=>t.side==='sell');
  if (S.tradeSymFilter) trades=trades.filter(t=>t.symbol.toLowerCase().includes(S.tradeSymFilter));

  const dir=S.tradeSortDir==='asc'?1:-1;
  trades.sort((a,b)=>{
    let av=a[S.tradeSortKey]??0,bv=b[S.tradeSortKey]??0;
    if (S.tradeSortKey==='timestamp'){av=new Date(av);bv=new Date(bv);}
    return av<bv?-dir:av>bv?dir:0;
  });

  const closed=S.trades.filter(t=>t.realized_pnl!==null&&t.realized_pnl!==undefined);
  const wins=closed.filter(t=>t.realized_pnl>0);
  const losses=closed.filter(t=>t.realized_pnl<0);
  const grossP=wins.reduce((a,t)=>a+t.realized_pnl,0);
  const grossL=losses.reduce((a,t)=>a+t.realized_pnl,0);
  const netPnl=grossP+grossL;
  const fees=S.trades.reduce((a,t)=>a+(t.fee_cost||0),0);
  const slipArr=S.trades.filter(t=>t.slippage_pct!=null);
  const avgSlip=slipArr.length?slipArr.reduce((a,t)=>a+(t.slippage_pct||0),0)/slipArr.length:0;

  setEl('th-wins',wins.length);setEl('th-losses',losses.length);
  setEl('th-gross-profit',fmtUSD(grossP,4));setEl('th-gross-loss',fmtUSD(grossL,4));
  const npEl=document.getElementById('th-net-pnl');
  if (npEl){npEl.textContent=signUSD(netPnl);npEl.className='stat-value '+(netPnl>=0?'green':'red');}
  setEl('th-after-fees',signUSD(netPnl-fees));
  setEl('th-fees',fmtUSD(fees,4));
  setEl('th-avg-slip',fmtNum(avgSlip,4)+'%');
  setEl('trade-count-label',trades.length+' trades ditampilkan');
  setEl('trade-subtitle',closed.length+' closed · Win Rate: '+(closed.length?(wins.length/closed.length*100).toFixed(1):0)+'%');

  const tb=document.getElementById('trades-tbody');
  if (!tb) return;
  if (!trades.length) {
    tb.innerHTML=`<tr><td colspan="13"><div class="empty-state"><div class="empty-icon">📋</div>No trades match filter</div></td></tr>`;
    return;
  }
  tb.innerHTML=trades.map(t=>{
    const pnl=t.realized_pnl;
    const hasPnl=pnl!==null&&pnl!==undefined;
    const origin=t.signal_origin||'—';
    return `<tr>
      <td>${fmtTimeShort(t.timestamp)}</td>
      <td class="symbol" onclick="openCoinDrawer('${esc(t.symbol)}')">${esc(t.symbol)}</td>
      <td><span class="side-badge ${t.side||''}">${(t.side||'').toUpperCase()}</span></td>
      <td style="font-size:9.5px">${t.order_type||'—'}</td>
      <td class="right">${fmtUSD(t.executed_price)}</td>
      <td class="right">${fmtNum(t.filled||t.amount,6)}</td>
      <td class="right">${fmtUSD(t.cost,2)}</td>
      <td class="right" style="color:var(--yellow)">${fmtUSD(t.fee_cost,5)}</td>
      <td class="right" style="color:${(t.slippage_pct||0)>0.1?'var(--red)':'var(--text-muted)'}">${fmtNum(t.slippage_pct,4)}%</td>
      <td class="right">${hasPnl?`<span class="${colorPnl(pnl)}">${signUSD(pnl)}</span>`:'<span style="color:var(--text-muted)">open</span>'}</td>
      <td style="color:var(--red);font-size:9.5px">${fmtUSD(t.stop_loss_price)}</td>
      <td style="color:var(--green);font-size:9.5px">${fmtUSD(t.take_profit_price)}</td>
      <td><span class="origin-pill" title="${esc(origin)}">${esc(origin.slice(0,55))}${origin.length>55?'…':''}</span></td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   ANALYTICS PAGE
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function loadAnalytics() {
  const m=await apiFetch('/metrics')||S.metrics||{};
  const trades=S.trades.length?S.trades:(await apiFetch('/trades?limit=200'))?.trades||[];
  S.trades=trades;

  setEl('an-winrate',fmtNum(m.win_rate_pct,1)+'%');
  const closed=trades.filter(t=>t.realized_pnl!=null);
  const wins=closed.filter(t=>t.realized_pnl>0);
  setEl('an-wintrades',wins.length+' wins / '+closed.length+' total');
  setEl('an-pf',    m.profit_factor===Infinity?'∞':fmtNum(m.profit_factor,3));
  setEl('an-exp',   signUSD(m.expectancy));
  setEl('an-sharpe',fmtNum(m.sharpe_ratio,4));
  setEl('an-sortino',fmtNum(m.sortino_ratio,4));
  setEl('an-calmar',fmtNum(m.calmar_ratio,4));
  setEl('an-maxdd',fmtNum(m.max_drawdown_pct,2)+'%');
  setEl('an-fees',  fmtUSD(m.total_fees,4));

  const expEl=document.getElementById('an-exp');
  if (expEl) expEl.className='metric-value '+(m.expectancy>=0?'green':'red');
  const sharpeEl=document.getElementById('an-sharpe');
  if (sharpeEl) sharpeEl.className='metric-value '+(m.sharpe_ratio>=1?'green':m.sharpe_ratio>=0?'yellow':'red');

  const bySymbol={};
  trades.forEach(t=>{
    if (!bySymbol[t.symbol]) bySymbol[t.symbol]={trades:0,wins:0,pnl:0,fees:0};
    bySymbol[t.symbol].trades++;
    if ((t.realized_pnl||0)>0) bySymbol[t.symbol].wins++;
    bySymbol[t.symbol].pnl+=(t.realized_pnl||0);
    bySymbol[t.symbol].fees+=(t.fee_cost||0);
  });
  const tb=document.getElementById('symbol-breakdown-tbody');
  const rows=Object.entries(bySymbol).sort((a,b)=>b[1].pnl-a[1].pnl);
  if (!rows.length) tb.innerHTML=`<tr><td colspan="9"><div class="empty-state">No trade data</div></td></tr>`;
  else {
    tb.innerHTML=rows.map(([sym,d])=>{
      const wr=d.trades?(d.wins/d.trades*100).toFixed(1):0;
      const net=d.pnl-d.fees;
      const prof=getProfile(sym);
      return `<tr>
        <td class="symbol" onclick="openCoinDrawer('${esc(sym)}')">${esc(sym)}</td>
        <td><span class="profile-chip">${getProfEmoji(prof)} ${esc(prof.replace(/_/g,' '))}</span></td>
        <td class="right">${d.trades}</td><td class="right">${d.wins}</td>
        <td class="right"><span class="${+wr>=50?'pnl-pos':'pnl-neg'}">${wr}%</span></td>
        <td class="right"><span class="${colorPnl(d.pnl)}">${signUSD(d.pnl)}</span></td>
        <td class="right"><span class="${colorPnl(d.pnl/d.trades)}">${signUSD(d.pnl/d.trades)}</span></td>
        <td class="right" style="color:var(--yellow)">${fmtUSD(d.fees,4)}</td>
        <td class="right"><span class="${colorPnl(net)}">${signUSD(net)}</span></td>
      </tr>`;
    }).join('');
  }
  renderAnalyticsCharts(trades);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   DIAGNOSA PAGE
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function loadDiagnosa() {
  const btn=document.getElementById('diagnosa-btn');
  const loading=document.getElementById('diagnosa-loading');
  const results=document.getElementById('diagnosa-results');
  const empty=document.getElementById('diagnosa-empty');
  const summary=document.getElementById('diagnosa-summary-cards');

  if (btn){btn.disabled=true;btn.textContent='⏳ Menganalisis...';}
  if (loading) loading.style.display='block';
  if (results) results.innerHTML='';
  if (empty)   empty.style.display='none';
  if (summary) summary.style.display='none';

  const data=await apiFetch('/diagnosa',60000);

  if (btn){btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent='🔍 Analisis Sekarang';}
  if (loading) loading.style.display='none';

  if (!data||!data.results||!data.results.length) {
    if (empty){empty.style.display='block';empty.innerHTML=`<div style="font-size:40px;margin-bottom:12px;opacity:0.3">❌</div><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600">Tidak dapat terhubung ke API</div><div style="font-size:11px;margin-top:6px">Pastikan bot berjalan di ${API_BASE}</div>`;}
    return;
  }

  S.diagnosaData=data;
  let buyCount=0,watchCount=0,noneCount=0;
  data.results.forEach(r=>{
    if (r.includes('SINYAL BUY')) buyCount++;
    else if (r.includes('3/4')||r.includes('2/4')) watchCount++;
    else noneCount++;
  });

  if (summary){
    summary.style.display='grid';
    setEl('diag-buy-count',buyCount);
    setEl('diag-watch-count',watchCount);
    setEl('diag-none-count',noneCount);
  }

  if (results) {
    results.innerHTML=data.results.map(r=>{
      const isBuy=r.includes('SINYAL BUY');
      const lines=r.split('\n').map(l=>l.trim()).filter(Boolean);
      const headerLine=lines[0]||'';
      const sym=headerLine.match(/\*([^*]+)\*/)?.[1]||'';
      const restLines=lines.slice(1);
      const tk=S.tickers[sym]||{};
      const sc=S.scores[sym];
      const price=tk.last;
      const chg=tk.change_pct||0;
      const up=chg>=0;
      const pStr=price?(price>=1?'$'+price.toFixed(2):'$'+price.toFixed(6)):'';
      const scVal=sc&&sc.total_score!==null?Math.round(sc.total_score):null;
      const scColor=scVal>=70?'var(--green)':scVal>=50?'var(--yellow)':'var(--red)';
      const regime=sc?sc.regime||'undefined':'';
      const rgCls='rb-'+regime.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_');
      return `<div class="diagnosa-card ${isBuy?'buy-signal':'no-signal'}" onclick="openCoinDrawer('${esc(sym)}')" style="cursor:pointer">
        <div class="diagnosa-header">
          <span class="diagnosa-sym">${isBuy?'🚀':'⏳'} ${esc(sym)}</span>
          ${isBuy?'<span class="status-chip open">BUY SIGNAL</span>':''}
          <span style="margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px">
            ${pStr?`<span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700">${pStr}</span>`:''}
            ${pStr?`<span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:${up?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'}">${up?'▲':'▼'}${Math.abs(chg).toFixed(2)}%</span>`:''}
            ${scVal!==null?`<span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:800;font-family:var(--font-mono);color:${scColor}">${scVal}</span>`:''}
            ${regime?`<span class="regime-badge ${rgCls}" style="font-size:8px;padding:2px 5px">${regime.replace(/_/g,' ').toUpperCase()}</span>`:''}
          </span>
        </div>
        ${restLines.map(l=>`<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);padding:1px 0">${formatDiagnosaLine(l)}</div>`).join('')}
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
  }
}

function formatDiagnosaLine(line) {
  return esc(line)
    .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g,'<code style="background:var(--bg-base);padding:1px 4px;border-radius:3px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10.5px">$1</code>')
    .replace(/\*([^*]+)\*/g,'<strong>$1</strong>');
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   RISK PAGE
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function loadRisk() {
  const h=await apiFetch('/system_health')||S.health||{};
  renderRiskPage(h);
}

function renderRiskPage(h) {
  h=h||S.health||{};
  setEl('r-curdd',fmtNum(h.current_drawdown_pct,2)+'%');
  const cddEl=document.getElementById('r-curdd');
  if (cddEl) cddEl.className='stat-value '+(h.current_drawdown_pct>10?'red':h.current_drawdown_pct>5?'yellow':'');
  setEl('r-daily',fmtNum(h.daily_loss_pct,2)+'%');
  setEl('r-daily-limit',(h.daily_loss_limit_pct||10)+'%');
  setEl('r-dd-limit',(h.max_drawdown_pct||15)+'%');
  setEl('r-open-pos',h.open_positions||0);
  setEl('r-max-open',h.max_open_positions||3);
  setEl('r-trailing',h.trailing_stop_enabled?'ON':'OFF');
  const rtEl=document.getElementById('r-trailing');
  if (rtEl) rtEl.className='stat-value '+(h.trailing_stop_enabled?'green':'red');
  setEl('r-trail-mult',(h.trailing_atr_mult||1.5)+'×');

  setEl('rp-maxdd',(h.max_drawdown_pct||15)+'%');
  setEl('rp-pos-size',(h.risk_per_trade_pct||1)+'% equity / trade');
  setEl('rp-daily',(h.daily_loss_limit_pct||10)+'%');
  setEl('rp-rpt',(h.risk_per_trade_pct||1)+'%');
  setEl('rp-equity',fmtUSD(h.current_equity,2));
  setEl('rp-initial',fmtUSD(h.initial_equity,2));
  setEl('rp-peak',fmtUSD(h.peak_equity,2));
  setEl('rp-free',fmtUSD(h.free_balance,2));
  setEl('rp-trail',(h.trailing_atr_mult||1.5)+'×');
  setEl('rp-halt',h.is_halted?'🔴 HALTED':'🟢 RUNNING');
  setEl('rp-halt-reason',h.halt_reason||'None');
  const hrEl=document.getElementById('rp-halt-reason');
  if (hrEl) hrEl.style.color=h.halt_reason?'var(--red)':'var(--green)';

  updateGauge(h.current_drawdown_pct||0,h.max_drawdown_pct||15);

  const dlPct=((h.daily_loss_pct||0)/(h.daily_loss_limit_pct||10)*100);
  const posPct=((h.open_positions||0)/(h.max_open_positions||3)*100);
  setBar('r-daily-bar',dlPct);setBar('r-pos-bar',posPct);
  setEl('r-daily-bar-lbl',fmtNum(h.daily_loss_pct,2)+'% / '+(h.daily_loss_limit_pct||10)+'%');
  setEl('r-pos-bar-lbl',(h.open_positions||0)+' / '+(h.max_open_positions||3));

  renderFeedHealth(h.ws_feed_status||{});
}

function updateGauge(current,max) {
  const pct=Math.min(1,current/max);
  const arcLen=251.3;
  const offset=arcLen*(1-pct);
  const arc=document.getElementById('gauge-arc');
  const txt=document.getElementById('gauge-text');
  if (arc) arc.style.strokeDashoffset=offset;
  if (txt){txt.textContent=current.toFixed(1)+'%';txt.setAttribute('fill',pct>0.67?'#f0455a':pct>0.33?'#f0b429':'#00d68f');}
}

function renderFeedHealth(feedStatus) {
  const tb=document.getElementById('feed-health-tbody');
  if (!tb) return;
  const entries=Object.entries(feedStatus);
  if (!entries.length){tb.innerHTML=`<tr><td colspan="8"><div class="empty-state">No feed data</div></td></tr>`;return;}
  tb.innerHTML=entries.map(([sym,s])=>`<tr>
    <td class="symbol">${esc(sym)}</td>
    <td class="center"><span class="${s.ticker_healthy?'status-chip open':'status-chip closing'}">${s.ticker_healthy?'OK':'STALE'}</span></td>
    <td class="center"><span class="${s.ob_healthy?'status-chip open':'status-chip closing'}">${s.ob_healthy?'OK':'—'}</span></td>
    <td class="right" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);color:${(s.ticker_age_secs||0)>15?'var(--yellow)':'var(--text-muted)'}">${fmtNum(s.ticker_age_secs,1)}s</td>
    <td class="right">${fmtUSD(s.last_price)}</td>
    <td class="right">${fmtUSD(s.mid_price)}</td>
    <td class="right" style="${(s.spread_pct||0)>0.1?'color:var(--yellow)':''}">${fmtNum(s.spread_pct,4)}%</td>
    <td class="center">${s.ticker_dead?'<span style="color:var(--red)">DEAD</span>':'<span style="color:var(--green)">OK</span>'}</td>
  </tr>`).join('');
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   WATCHLIST
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function loadWatchlist() {
  const tkData=await apiFetch('/tickers');
  if (tkData&&tkData.tickers) S.tickers=tkData.tickers;
  renderCoinGrid();
  setEl('watchlist-subtitle',S.watchlist.length+' coins · VolumetricBreakout v7.0');
}

function renderCoinGrid() {
  const grid=document.getElementById('coin-grid');
  if (!grid) return;
  const filter=S.profileFilter;
  const search=(document.getElementById('coin-search')?.value||'').toLowerCase();

  const coins=S.watchlist.filter(sym=>{
    const prof=getProfile(sym);
    return (filter==='all'||prof===filter)&&(!search||sym.toLowerCase().includes(search));
  });

  setEl('watchlist-subtitle',coins.length+' coins ditampilkan · VolumetricBreakout v7.0');

  if (!coins.length){grid.innerHTML=`<div style="grid-column:1/-1;text-align:center;padding:30px;color:var(--text-muted)">No coins match filter</div>`;return;}

  grid.innerHTML=coins.map(sym=>{
    const base=sym.split('/')[0];
    const prof=getProfile(sym);
    const t=S.tickers[sym]||{};
    const price=t.last||0;
    const chg=t.change_pct||0;
    const up=chg>=0;
    const inPos=S.positions.some(p=>p.symbol===sym);
    const pfCls=PROFILE_CLASS[prof]||'';
    const pfEmj=PROFILE_EMOJI[prof]||'⚙️';
    const iCls=getCoinIcon(sym);
    const vol24=t.quote_volume||0;
    const pcfg=PROFILE_CFG[prof]||PROFILE_CFG.scalp_volatile;
    const tf=PROFILE_TF[prof]||'15m';
    const pStr=price>=1?'$'+price.toFixed(2):price>=0.001?'$'+price.toFixed(5):price>=0.00001?'$'+price.toFixed(7):'$'+price.toFixed(10);
    const volStr=vol24>=1e9?'$'+(vol24/1e9).toFixed(2)+'B':vol24>=1e6?'$'+(vol24/1e6).toFixed(1)+'M':vol24>=1e3?'$'+(vol24/1e3).toFixed(0)+'K':'—';

    return `<div class="coin-card${inPos?' signal-active':''}" onclick="openCoinDrawer('${sym}')">
      <span class="coin-profile-tag ${pfCls}">${pfEmj} ${prof.replace(/_/g,' ').replace(/\w+/g,w=>w[0].toUpperCase()+w.slice(1,3))}</span>
      <div class="coin-card-top">
        <div class="coin-icon ${iCls}">${base.slice(0,3)}</div>
        <div><div class="coin-name">${base}</div><div class="coin-pair">${sym}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="coin-price">${price?pStr:'$—'}</div>
      <div class="coin-change ${up?'up':'down'}">${up?'▲':'▼'} ${Math.abs(chg).toFixed(2)}%</div>
      <div class="coin-stats">
        <div class="coin-stat-item"><div class="coin-stat-label">Vol 24h</div><div class="coin-stat-value">${volStr}</div></div>
        <div class="coin-stat-item"><div class="coin-stat-label">TF / SL</div><div class="coin-stat-value">${tf} / ${pcfg.sl}%</div></div>
        <div class="coin-stat-item"><div class="coin-stat-label">RSI Range</div><div class="coin-stat-value">${pcfg.rsi_min}–${pcfg.rsi_max}</div></div>
        <div class="coin-stat-item"><div class="coin-stat-label">Vol Mult</div><div class="coin-stat-value">${pcfg.vol}×</div></div>
      </div>
      ${(()=>{
        const sc=S.scores[sym];
        if(!sc) return '';
        const score=sc.total_score;
        const regime=sc.regime||'undefined';
        const scColor=score>=70?'var(--green)':score>=50?'var(--yellow)':'var(--red)';
        const rgCls='rb-'+regime.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_');
        return '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:7px;gap:5px">'
          +(score!==null?'<span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:800;font-family:var(--font-mono);color:'+scColor+'">▲ '+Math.round(score)+'</span>':'')
          +'<span class="regime-badge '+rgCls+'" style="font-size:8.5px;padding:2px 6px">'+regime.replace(/_/g,' ').toUpperCase()+'</span>'
          +(sc.trigger_met?'<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--green);font-weight:700">✓ SIGNAL</span>':'')
          +'</div>';
      })()}
      ${inPos?'<div style="margin-top:4px;padding:4px 6px;background:var(--green-bg);border:1px solid rgba(0,214,143,0.2);border-radius:4px;font-size:9.5px;color:var(--green);font-weight:600">📌 OPEN POSITION</div>':''}
      <div class="signal-pulse"></div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function filterProfile(pf,btn) {
  S.profileFilter=pf;
  document.querySelectorAll('#profile-filter-bar .filter-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
  renderCoinGrid();
}
function filterCoins() { renderCoinGrid(); }

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   SETTINGS
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function loadSettings() {
  const h=S.health||await apiFetch('/system_health')||{};
  const s=S.status||await apiFetch('/status')||{};
  const cfgData=await apiFetch('/config/current')||{};
  const cfg=cfgData.config||{};
  setEl('cfg-exchange',(cfg.exchange_id||s.exchange||'').toUpperCase());
  setEl('cfg-strategy',cfg.strategy||s.strategy||'VolumetricBreakout');
  setEl('cfg-mode',(cfg.testnet!==undefined?cfg.testnet:s.testnet)?'TESTNET':'LIVE');
  setEl('cfg-tf',cfg.timeframe||s.timeframe||'--');
  setEl('cfg-watchlist',(cfg.watchlist||s.watchlist||[]).join(', '));
  setEl('cfg-uptime',s.uptime_display||'--');
  setEl('cfg-api-status',S.apiOnline?'Connected':'Offline');
  const fields={
    'cfg-maxdd':   cfg.max_drawdown_pct,
    'cfg-maxpos':  cfg.max_position_size_pct,
    'cfg-daily':   cfg.daily_loss_limit_pct,
    'cfg-rpt':     cfg.risk_per_trade_pct,
    'cfg-atr-sl':  cfg.atr_multiplier_sl,
    'cfg-atr-tp':  cfg.atr_multiplier_tp,
    'cfg-trail-mult': cfg.trailing_atr_mult,
    'cfg-max-open':cfg.max_open_positions,
    'cfg-init-cap':cfg.initial_capital,
  };
  Object.entries(fields).forEach(([id,val])=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(id);
    if(el&&val!==undefined&&val!==null) el.value=val;
  });
  const exEl=document.getElementById('cfg-exchange-id');
  if(exEl&&cfg.exchange_id) exEl.value=cfg.exchange_id;
  const tnEl=document.getElementById('cfg-testnet-sel');
  if(tnEl&&cfg.testnet!==undefined) tnEl.value=String(cfg.testnet);
  const wlEl=document.getElementById('cfg-watchlist-edit');
  if(wlEl&&cfg.watchlist) wlEl.value=(cfg.watchlist||[]).join(',');

  const tb=document.getElementById('profile-table-tbody');
  if (!tb) return;
  tb.innerHTML=(s.watchlist||WATCHLIST_DEFAULT).map(sym=>{
    const prof=getProfile(sym);
    const pcfg=PROFILE_CFG[prof]||PROFILE_CFG.scalp_volatile;
    const tf=PROFILE_TF[prof]||'15m';
    const tfSecs={'1m':60,'3m':180,'5m':300,'15m':900,'30m':1800,'1h':3600,'4h':14400,'1d':86400};
    const mhStr=pcfg.max_hold===0?'∞ (no limit)':(pcfg.max_hold>0?(pcfg.max_hold+'c = '+((pcfg.max_hold*(tfSecs[tf]||900))/3600).toFixed(1)+'h'):'—');
    return `<tr>
      <td class="symbol">${esc(sym)}</td>
      <td><span class="profile-chip">${getProfEmoji(prof)} ${esc(prof.replace(/_/g,' '))}</span></td>
      <td>${tf}</td><td>${pcfg.vol}×</td>
      <td>${pcfg.rsi_min}–${pcfg.rsi_max}</td>
      <td>${pcfg.atr_sl}×</td><td>${pcfg.atr_tp}×</td>
      <td>${pcfg.sl}%</td><td>${pcfg.tp}%</td>
      <td>${pcfg.trail_act}%</td>
      <td style="font-size:9.5px">${mhStr}</td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   COIN DRAWER
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function openCoinDrawer(sym) {
  const base=sym.split('/')[0];
  const prof=getProfile(sym);
  const t=S.tickers[sym]||{};
  const price=t.last||0;
  const chg=t.change_pct||0;
  const up=chg>=0;
  const tf=PROFILE_TF[prof]||'15m';

  // Set header info
  const iEl=document.getElementById('drawer-icon');
  if(iEl){iEl.textContent=base.slice(0,3);iEl.className='coin-icon '+getCoinIcon(sym);}
  setEl('drawer-name',sym);
  setEl('drawer-profile',getProfEmoji(prof)+' '+prof.replace(/_/g,' ')+' · TF: '+tf);
  const pStr=price>=1?'$'+price.toFixed(2):price?'$'+price.toFixed(6):'$—';
  setEl('drawer-price',pStr);
  const dcEl=document.getElementById('drawer-change');
  if(dcEl){dcEl.textContent=(up?'▲ +':'▼ ')+Math.abs(chg).toFixed(2)+'%';dcEl.style.color=up?'var(--green)':'var(--red)';}

  // Set hero
  const hiEl=document.getElementById('cd-hero-icon');
  if(hiEl){hiEl.textContent=base.slice(0,3);hiEl.className='coin-icon '+getCoinIcon(sym)+' cd-hero-icon';}
  setEl('cd-hero-name',base);
  setEl('cd-hero-pair',sym);
  setEl('cd-hero-price',pStr);
  const hcEl=document.getElementById('cd-hero-change');
  if(hcEl){hcEl.textContent=(up?'▲ +':'▼ ')+Math.abs(chg).toFixed(2)+'%';hcEl.className='cd-hero-change '+(up?'up':'down');}

  // Show full page
  document.getElementById('coin-overlay').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow='hidden';

  // Load charts
  S.cdSym=sym; S.cdTf=tf;
  const defaultPill=document.querySelector(`#cd-tf-pills .chart-tf-pill[onclick*="${tf}"]`);
  document.querySelectorAll('#cd-tf-pills .chart-tf-pill').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  if(defaultPill)defaultPill.classList.add('active');
  else{const p15=document.querySelector('#cd-tf-pills .chart-tf-pill[onclick*="15m"]');if(p15)p15.classList.add('active');}
  cdLoadChart(tf);

  // Load intelligence score
  const intel=await apiFetch('/intelligence/scores/'+encodeURIComponent(sym));
  if(intel){
    const sc=intel.total_score;
    const scoreEl=document.getElementById('cd-total-score');
    if(scoreEl){scoreEl.textContent=sc!==null?Math.round(sc):'—';scoreEl.style.color=sc>=70?'var(--green)':sc>=50?'var(--yellow)':'var(--red)';}
    const sbEl=document.getElementById('cd-score-badge');
    if(sbEl){
      const q=sc>=85?['qb-excellent','🔥 Excellent']:sc>=70?['qb-good','✅ Good']:sc>=50?['qb-fair','⚠️ Fair']:['qb-poor','❌ Poor'];
      sbEl.innerHTML='<span class="quality-badge '+q[0]+'">'+q[1]+'</span>';
    }
    const bd=intel.breakdown||{};
    const keys=[['Trend','trend'],['Momentum','momentum'],['Strength','strength'],['Volatility','volatility'],['Pattern','pattern'],['Oscillator','oscillator'],['Structure','structure'],['Orderbook','orderbook']];
    const sEl=document.getElementById('cd-score-bars');
    if(sEl)sEl.innerHTML=keys.map(([lbl,k])=>{
      const v=bd[k]||0;const c=v>=70?'var(--green)':v>=50?'var(--yellow)':'var(--red)';
      return '<div class="score-bar-wrap"><div class="score-bar-header"><span class="score-bar-label">'+lbl+'</span><span class="score-bar-val" style="color:'+c+'">'+(v!==null?Math.round(v):'—')+'</span></div><div class="score-bar-track"><div class="score-bar-fill" style="width:'+(v||0)+'%;background:'+c+'"></div></div></div>';
    }).join('');
    const reg=intel.regime||'undefined';
    setEl('cd-regime-val',reg);
    const rbEl=document.getElementById('drawer-regime-badge');
    if(rbEl)rbEl.innerHTML='<span class="regime-badge rb-'+reg.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'_')+'">'+reg.replace(/_/g,' ').toUpperCase()+'</span>';
    const trEl=document.getElementById('cd-trigger');
    if(trEl){trEl.textContent=intel.trigger_met?'✅ YES':'❌ No';trEl.style.color=intel.trigger_met?'var(--green)':'var(--red)';}
    setEl('cd-action',intel.action_taken||'—');
    setEl('cd-updated',intel.last_updated?new Date(intel.last_updated).toLocaleTimeString('id-ID'):'—');
    const hist=intel.history_24h||[];
    const hEl=document.getElementById('cd-score-history');
    if(hEl&&hist.length){
      const mx=Math.max(...hist.map(h=>h.total_score||0))||100;
      hEl.innerHTML=hist.slice(-24).map(h=>{
        const pct=((h.total_score||0)/mx*100).toFixed(0);
        const c=h.total_score>=70?'var(--green)':h.total_score>=50?'var(--yellow)':'var(--red)';
        return '<div class="history-bar" style="height:'+pct+'%;background:'+c+';opacity:0.75" title="'+Math.round(h.total_score||0)+'"></div>';
      }).join('');
    }
  }

  // Load forecast
  const fcast=await apiFetch('/forecast');
  const fc=fcast&&fcast.forecasts?fcast.forecasts.find(f=>f.symbol===sym):null;
  if(fc){
    document.getElementById('cd-no-forecast').style.display='none';
    const probPct=fc.probability_up_pct||0;
    const circ=document.getElementById('cd-prob-circle');
    if(circ){const off=238.76*(1-probPct/100);circ.style.strokeDashoffset=off;circ.style.stroke=probPct>=60?'var(--green)':probPct>=40?'var(--yellow)':'var(--red)';}
    const ppEl=document.getElementById('cd-prob-pct');
    if(ppEl){ppEl.textContent=probPct.toFixed(1)+'%';ppEl.style.color=probPct>=60?'var(--green)':probPct>=40?'var(--yellow)':'var(--red)';}
    const qEl=document.getElementById('cd-quality-badge');
    if(qEl){const qm={excellent:'qb-excellent',good:'qb-good',fair:'qb-fair',poor:'qb-poor'};const q=fc.signal_quality||'fair';qEl.innerHTML='<span class="quality-badge '+(qm[q]||'qb-fair')+'">'+q.toUpperCase()+'</span>';}
    setEl('cd-rr',fc.rr_ratio?fc.rr_ratio.toFixed(2)+'×':'—');
    setEl('cd-fc-sl',fc.suggested_sl?fmtUSD(fc.suggested_sl):'—');
    setEl('cd-fc-sl-pct',fc.potential_loss_pct?'▼ '+fc.potential_loss_pct.toFixed(2)+'%':'');
    setEl('cd-fc-tp',fc.suggested_tp?fmtUSD(fc.suggested_tp):'—');
    setEl('cd-fc-tp-pct',fc.potential_profit_pct?'▲ '+fc.potential_profit_pct.toFixed(2)+'%':'');
    setEl('cd-fc-profit',fc.potential_profit_pct?'+'+fc.potential_profit_pct.toFixed(2)+'%':'—');
    setEl('cd-fc-loss',fc.potential_loss_pct?'-'+fc.potential_loss_pct.toFixed(2)+'%':'—');
    setEl('cd-lv-support',fc.nearest_support?fmtUSD(fc.nearest_support):'—');
    setEl('cd-lv-resistance',fc.nearest_resistance?fmtUSD(fc.nearest_resistance):'—');
    setEl('cd-lv-fibsup',fc.fib_support?fmtUSD(fc.fib_support):'—');
    setEl('cd-lv-fibres',fc.fib_resistance?fmtUSD(fc.fib_resistance):'—');
  } else {
    document.getElementById('cd-no-forecast').style.display='block';
  }

  // Open position info
  const pos=S.positions.find(p=>p.symbol===sym);
  const ppan=document.getElementById('cd-position-panel');
  if(pos&&ppan){
    ppan.style.display='block';
    setEl('cd-pos-entry',fmtUSD(pos.entry_price));
    const pnlEl=document.getElementById('cd-pos-pnl');
    if(pnlEl){pnlEl.textContent=signUSD(pos.unrealized_pnl);pnlEl.className='info-row-value '+(pos.unrealized_pnl>=0?'fv-green':'fv-red');}
    setEl('cd-pos-pnlpct',signPct(pos.unrealized_pnl_pct));
    setEl('cd-pos-amount',fmtNum(pos.amount,6));
    setEl('cd-pos-sl',fmtUSD(pos.stop_loss_price));
    setEl('cd-pos-tp',fmtUSD(pos.take_profit_price));
  } else if(ppan) ppan.style.display='none';

  // Recent trades
  setEl('cd-trades-sym',sym);
  const coinTrades=S.trades.filter(t=>t.symbol===sym).slice(0,20);
  setEl('cd-trades-count',coinTrades.length+' trades');
  const tb=document.getElementById('cd-trades-tbody');
  if(tb){
    tb.innerHTML=coinTrades.length?coinTrades.map(t=>{
      const pnl=t.realized_pnl;const hp=pnl!=null;
      return '<tr><td style="font-size:9.5px">'+fmtTimeShort(t.timestamp)+'</td><td><span class="side-badge '+(t.side||'')+'" style="font-size:9px;padding:1px 6px">'+((t.side||'').toUpperCase())+'</span></td><td style="font-size:9.5px">'+(t.order_type||'—')+'</td><td class="right">'+fmtUSD(t.executed_price)+'</td><td class="right">'+fmtNum(t.filled||t.amount,6)+'</td><td class="right">'+fmtUSD(t.cost,2)+'</td><td class="right">'+(hp?'<span class="'+colorPnl(pnl)+'">'+signUSD(pnl)+'</span>':'<span style="color:var(--text-muted)">open</span>')+'</td><td class="right" style="color:var(--yellow)">'+fmtUSD(t.fee_cost,5)+'</td><td class="right" style="font-size:9.5px">'+fmtNum(t.slippage_pct,4)+'%</td></tr>';
    }).join(''):'<tr><td colspan="9"><div class="empty-state">No trades for '+esc(sym)+'</div></td></tr>';
  }

  // Profile config
  const pcfg=PROFILE_CFG[prof]||PROFILE_CFG.scalp_volatile;
  const pbEl=document.getElementById('cd-profile-body');
  if(pbEl)pbEl.innerHTML=
    dRow('Profile',getProfEmoji(prof)+' '+prof.replace(/_/g,' '))+
    dRow('Timeframe',tf)+
    dRow('Vol Mult',pcfg.vol?pcfg.vol+'×':'—')+
    dRow('RSI Range',pcfg.rsi_min&&pcfg.rsi_max?pcfg.rsi_min+' – '+pcfg.rsi_max:'—')+
    dRow('ATR SL',pcfg.atr_sl?pcfg.atr_sl+'×':'—')+
    dRow('ATR TP',pcfg.atr_tp?pcfg.atr_tp+'×':'—')+
    dRow('Quick SL',pcfg.sl?pcfg.sl+'%':'—')+
    dRow('Quick TP',pcfg.tp?pcfg.tp+'%':'—')+
    dRow('Trail Act',pcfg.trail_act?pcfg.trail_act+'%':'—')+
    dRow('24h High',t.high_24h?fmtUSD(t.high_24h):'—')+
    dRow('24h Low',t.low_24h?fmtUSD(t.low_24h):'—')+
    dRow('24h Vol',t.quote_volume?fmtUSD(t.quote_volume,0):'—')+
    dRow('Spread',fmtNum(t.spread_pct||0,4)+'%');
}

function dStat(label,value) {
  return `<div style="background:var(--bg-base);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:7px"><div style="font-size:9.5px;color:var(--text-muted);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px">${label}</div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-mono)">${value}</div></div>`;
}
function dRow(label,value) {
  return `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:11px"><span style="color:var(--text-muted)">${label}</span><span style="font-weight:600;font-family:var(--font-mono)">${value}</span></div>`;
}

function closeCoinDrawer(e) { /* no-op for full page */ }
function closeCoinDrawerDirect() {
  document.getElementById('coin-overlay').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow='';
  S.cdSym=null;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   COIN DETAIL CHARTS
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function cdLoadChart(tf, btn) {
  S.cdTf=tf;
  if(btn){
    document.querySelectorAll('#cd-tf-pills .chart-tf-pill').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
  }
  const sym=S.cdSym; if(!sym) return;
  const loadEl=document.getElementById('cd-candle-loading');
  if(loadEl) loadEl.style.display='flex';
  const lim=tf==='1m'?120:tf==='5m'?120:tf==='15m'?100:tf==='1h'?100:tf==='4h'?80:60;
  const data=await apiFetch('/candles/'+encodeURIComponent(sym)+'?timeframe='+tf+'&limit='+lim);
  if(loadEl) loadEl.style.display='none';
  if(!data||!data.candles||!data.candles.length) return;
  const candles=data.candles; const markers=data.markers||[];
  drawCandlestickChart(document.getElementById('cd-candle-chart'),candles,markers);
  drawAreaVolChart(document.getElementById('cd-area-chart'),document.getElementById('cd-vol-chart'),candles);
  const last=candles[candles.length-1];
  if(last){
    setEl('cd-area-close',fmtUSD(last.close));
    const vk=last.quote_volume?'$'+(last.quote_volume/1000).toFixed(0)+'K':last.volume?fmtNum(last.volume,2):'—';
    setEl('cd-area-vol',vk);
  }
}

function drawCandlestickChart(canvas, candles, markers) {
  if(!canvas) return;
  markers=markers||[];
  const dpr=window.devicePixelRatio||1;
  const W=canvas.offsetWidth||canvas.parentElement?.offsetWidth||700;
  const H=280;
  canvas.width=W*dpr; canvas.height=H*dpr;
  const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.scale(dpr,dpr);
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  if(!candles||candles.length<2){
    ctx.fillStyle='#4a5878';ctx.font='12px sans-serif';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('No candle data',W/2,H/2); return;
  }
  const pad={t:10,r:16,b:32,l:62};
  const iw=W-pad.l-pad.r, ih=H-pad.t-pad.b;
  const highs=candles.map(c=>c.high), lows=candles.map(c=>c.low);
  const maxP=Math.max(...highs), minP=Math.min(...lows), pRng=maxP-minP||1;
  const px=i=>pad.l+(i+0.5)*(iw/candles.length);
  const py=v=>pad.t+ih-((v-minP)/pRng)*ih;
  const cw=Math.max(2,(iw/candles.length)*0.65);
  // Grid
  ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(30,45,69,0.6)';ctx.lineWidth=0.5;
  for(let i=0;i<=5;i++){
    const y=pad.t+(i/5)*ih;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(pad.l,y);ctx.lineTo(pad.l+iw,y);ctx.stroke();
    const v=maxP-(i/5)*pRng;
    ctx.fillStyle='#4a5878';ctx.font='9px monospace';ctx.textAlign='right';
    const lbl=v>=10000?'$'+(v/1000).toFixed(0)+'K':v>=1?'$'+v.toFixed(2):'$'+v.toFixed(5);
    ctx.fillText(lbl,pad.l-4,y+3);
  }
  // Time labels
  const step=Math.max(1,Math.floor(candles.length/6));
  candles.forEach((c,i)=>{
    if(i%step===0){
      const d=new Date(c.timestamp);
      const lbl=d.getUTCHours().toString().padStart(2,'0')+':'+d.getUTCMinutes().toString().padStart(2,'0');
      ctx.fillStyle='#4a5878';ctx.font='8px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
      ctx.fillText(lbl,px(i),H-pad.b+12);
    }
  });
  // Candles
  candles.forEach((c,i)=>{
    const x=px(i),open=py(c.open),close=py(c.close),high=py(c.high),low=py(c.low);
    const bull=c.close>=c.open;
    const color=bull?'#00d68f':'#f0455a';
    ctx.strokeStyle=color;ctx.lineWidth=1;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,high);ctx.lineTo(x,low);ctx.stroke();
    const bodyY=Math.min(open,close),bodyH=Math.max(1,Math.abs(close-open));
    ctx.fillStyle=bull?'rgba(0,214,143,0.85)':'rgba(240,69,90,0.85)';
    ctx.fillRect(x-cw/2,bodyY,cw,bodyH);
    if(bull){ctx.strokeStyle='#00d68f';ctx.lineWidth=0.5;ctx.strokeRect(x-cw/2,bodyY,cw,bodyH);}
  });
  // Trade markers
  markers.forEach(m=>{
    if(!m.timestamp||!m.price) return;
    const idx=candles.findIndex(c=>Math.abs(c.timestamp-m.timestamp)<60000*15);
    if(idx<0) return;
    const x=px(idx),y=py(m.price);
    const isBuy=m.side==='buy';
    ctx.beginPath();
    if(isBuy){ctx.moveTo(x,y+10);ctx.lineTo(x-5,y+18);ctx.lineTo(x+5,y+18);ctx.closePath();ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,214,143,0.9)';}
    else{ctx.moveTo(x,y-10);ctx.lineTo(x-5,y-18);ctx.lineTo(x+5,y-18);ctx.closePath();ctx.fillStyle='rgba(240,69,90,0.9)';}
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle=isBuy?'var(--green)':'var(--red)';
    ctx.font='bold 8px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText(isBuy?'B':'S',x,isBuy?y+28:y-20);
  });
}

function drawAreaVolChart(areaCanvas, volCanvas, candles) {
  if(!areaCanvas||!volCanvas||!candles.length) return;
  const dpr=window.devicePixelRatio||1;
  const W=areaCanvas.offsetWidth||areaCanvas.parentElement?.offsetWidth||700;
  const aH=90, vH=40;
  // Area
  areaCanvas.width=W*dpr; areaCanvas.height=aH*dpr;
  const actx=areaCanvas.getContext('2d'); actx.scale(dpr,dpr);
  actx.clearRect(0,0,W,aH);
  const closes=candles.map(c=>c.close);
  const maxC=Math.max(...closes),minC=Math.min(...closes),rng=maxC-minC||1;
  const pad={t:6,r:12,b:16,l:58};
  const iw=W-pad.l-pad.r,ih=aH-pad.t-pad.b;
  const px=i=>pad.l+(i/(closes.length-1))*iw;
  const py=v=>pad.t+ih-((v-minC)/rng)*ih;
  [0,0.5,1].forEach(f=>{
    const y=pad.t+f*ih;
    actx.strokeStyle='rgba(30,45,69,0.5)';actx.lineWidth=0.5;
    actx.beginPath();actx.moveTo(pad.l,y);actx.lineTo(pad.l+iw,y);actx.stroke();
    const v=maxC-f*rng;
    const lbl=v>=10000?'$'+(v/1000).toFixed(0)+'K':v>=1?'$'+v.toFixed(2):'$'+v.toFixed(5);
    actx.fillStyle='#4a5878';actx.font='8px monospace';actx.textAlign='right';
    actx.fillText(lbl,pad.l-3,y+3);
  });
  const first=closes[0],last=closes[closes.length-1];
  const lineColor=last>=first?'#00d68f':'#f0455a';
  const grad=actx.createLinearGradient(0,pad.t,0,pad.t+ih);
  grad.addColorStop(0,last>=first?'rgba(0,214,143,0.2)':'rgba(240,69,90,0.2)');
  grad.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
  actx.beginPath();actx.moveTo(px(0),py(closes[0]));
  closes.forEach((v,i)=>{if(i)actx.lineTo(px(i),py(v));});
  actx.lineTo(px(closes.length-1),pad.t+ih);actx.lineTo(px(0),pad.t+ih);
  actx.closePath();actx.fillStyle=grad;actx.fill();
  actx.beginPath();actx.moveTo(px(0),py(closes[0]));
  closes.forEach((v,i)=>{if(i)actx.lineTo(px(i),py(v));});
  actx.strokeStyle=lineColor;actx.lineWidth=1.5;actx.lineJoin='round';actx.stroke();
  // Volume
  volCanvas.width=W*dpr; volCanvas.height=vH*dpr;
  const vctx=volCanvas.getContext('2d'); vctx.scale(dpr,dpr);
  vctx.clearRect(0,0,W,vH);
  const vols=candles.map(c=>c.volume||0);
  const maxV=Math.max(...vols)||1;
  const bw=iw/candles.length;
  candles.forEach((c,i)=>{
    const vh=((c.volume||0)/maxV)*(vH-4);
    vctx.fillStyle=c.close>=c.open?'rgba(0,214,143,0.5)':'rgba(240,69,90,0.5)';
    vctx.fillRect(pad.l+i*bw+1,vH-vh-2,bw-2,vh);
  });
  vctx.fillStyle='#4a5878';vctx.font='8px monospace';vctx.textAlign='left';
  vctx.fillText('Vol',4,vH-4);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   SETTINGS SAVE FUNCTIONS
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function saveRiskConfig() {
  if(!DASHBOARD_API_KEY){showToast('warn','API Key Diperlukan','Isi Dashboard API Key di Settings.');return;}
  const payload={};
  const fields=[
    ['cfg-maxdd','max_drawdown_pct','float'],
    ['cfg-maxpos','max_position_size_pct','float'],
    ['cfg-daily','daily_loss_limit_pct','float'],
    ['cfg-rpt','risk_per_trade_pct','float'],
    ['cfg-atr-sl','atr_multiplier_sl','float'],
    ['cfg-atr-tp','atr_multiplier_tp','float'],
    ['cfg-trail-mult','trailing_atr_mult','float'],
    ['cfg-max-open','max_open_positions','int'],
    ['cfg-init-cap','initial_capital','float'],
  ];
  fields.forEach(([id,key,type])=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(id);
    if(el&&el.value.trim()!==''){
      const v=el.value.trim();
      payload[key]=type==='int'?parseInt(v):parseFloat(v);
    }
  });
  if(!Object.keys(payload).length){showToast('warn','Kosong','Tidak ada perubahan untuk disimpan.');return;}
  const r=await apiPost('/config/update',payload);
  if(r&&r.success){
    showToast('buy','Tersimpan','Risk config diupdate! Aktif dalam ~30 detik.');
    addFeedItem('info','CFG','Risk config updated: '+Object.keys(payload).join(', '));
  } else showToast('warn','Gagal','Gagal simpan. Periksa API Key.');
}

async function saveExchangeConfig() {
  if(!DASHBOARD_API_KEY){showToast('warn','API Key Diperlukan','Isi Dashboard API Key di Settings.');return;}
  const payload={};
  const exchId=document.getElementById('cfg-exchange-id')?.value;
  const key=document.getElementById('cfg-exch-key')?.value.trim();
  const secret=document.getElementById('cfg-exch-secret')?.value.trim();
  const passphrase=document.getElementById('cfg-exch-passphrase')?.value.trim();
  const testnet=document.getElementById('cfg-testnet-sel')?.value;
  const watchlistRaw=document.getElementById('cfg-watchlist-edit')?.value.trim();
  if(exchId) payload.exchange_id=exchId;
  if(key) payload.api_key=key;
  if(secret) payload.api_secret=secret;
  if(passphrase) payload.api_passphrase=passphrase;
  if(testnet!==undefined) payload.testnet=(testnet==='true');
  if(watchlistRaw) payload.watchlist=watchlistRaw.split(',').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  if(!Object.keys(payload).length){showToast('warn','Kosong','Tidak ada perubahan.');return;}
  if(!confirm('Ganti exchange config akan reconnect bot. Lanjutkan?')) return;
  const r=await apiPost('/config/update',payload);
  if(r&&r.success){
    showToast('buy','Tersimpan','Exchange config diupdate! Bot reconnect dalam ~30 detik.');
    addFeedItem('warn','CFG','Exchange config updated: '+Object.keys(payload).join(', '));
  } else showToast('warn','Gagal','Gagal simpan config.');
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   CHARTS
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
function drawLineChart(canvas,data,color,h=200) {
  if (!canvas) return {destroy:()=>{}};
  const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
  const dpr=window.devicePixelRatio||1;
  const W=canvas.offsetWidth||canvas.parentElement?.offsetWidth||400;
  canvas.width=W*dpr; canvas.height=h*dpr; ctx.scale(dpr,dpr);
  const w=W; ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);

  if (!data||data.length<2) {
    ctx.fillStyle='#4a5878';ctx.font='12px sans-serif';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('No data available',w/2,h/2);
    return {destroy:()=>{}};
  }

  const min=Math.min(...data),max=Math.max(...data),rang=max-min||1;
  const pad={t:10,r:10,b:24,l:58};
  const iw=w-pad.l-pad.r, ih=h-pad.t-pad.b;
  const px=i=>pad.l+(i/(data.length-1))*iw;
  const py=v=>pad.t+ih-((v-min)/rang)*ih;

  // Grid
  for(let i=0;i<=4;i++){
    const y=pad.t+(i/4)*ih;
    ctx.strokeStyle=i===4?'rgba(30,45,69,0.8)':'rgba(30,45,69,0.45)';
    ctx.lineWidth=i===4?1:0.5;
    ctx.setLineDash(i===0||i===4?[]:[3,4]);
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(pad.l,y);ctx.lineTo(pad.l+iw,y);ctx.stroke();
    ctx.setLineDash([]);
    const v=max-(i/4)*rang;
    ctx.fillStyle='#4a5878';ctx.font='9px monospace';ctx.textAlign='right';
    const label=v>=1000?'$'+(v/1000).toFixed(1)+'K':v>=1?'$'+v.toFixed(2):'$'+v.toFixed(5);
    ctx.fillText(label,pad.l-4,y+3);
  }

  // Parse color to rgb
  let r=69,g=137,b=255;
  try{r=parseInt(color.slice(1,3),16);g=parseInt(color.slice(3,5),16);b=parseInt(color.slice(5,7),16);}catch(e){}

  // Gradient fill — richer multi-stop
  const grad=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,pad.t,0,pad.t+ih);
  grad.addColorStop(0,`rgba(${r},${g},${b},0.35)`);
  grad.addColorStop(0.4,`rgba(${r},${g},${b},0.15)`);
  grad.addColorStop(1,`rgba(${r},${g},${b},0)`);

  // Smooth bezier path
  const smooth=(pts)=>{
    ctx.moveTo(pts[0][0],pts[0][1]);
    for(let i=0;i<pts.length-1;i++){
      const mx=(pts[i][0]+pts[i+1][0])/2;
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(mx,pts[i][1],mx,pts[i+1][1],pts[i+1][0],pts[i+1][1]);
    }
  };
  const pts=data.map((v,i)=>[px(i),py(v)]);

  // Fill area
  ctx.beginPath();
  smooth(pts);
  ctx.lineTo(px(data.length-1),pad.t+ih);
  ctx.lineTo(px(0),pad.t+ih);
  ctx.closePath();
  ctx.fillStyle=grad;ctx.fill();

  // Line
  ctx.beginPath();
  smooth(pts);
  ctx.strokeStyle=color;ctx.lineWidth=1.8;ctx.lineJoin='round';ctx.stroke();

  // Glow dot at last point
  const lx=px(data.length-1),ly=py(data[data.length-1]);
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(lx,ly,5,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(${r},${g},${b},0.2)`;ctx.fill();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(lx,ly,3,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle=color;ctx.fill();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(lx,ly,1.5,0,Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.fill();

  return {destroy:()=>{}};
}

function renderEquityChart() {
  const canvas=document.getElementById('equity-chart');
  if (!canvas) return;
  let curve=S.equityCurve;
  if (S.eqTFSlice>0) curve=curve.slice(-S.eqTFSlice);
  const data=curve.map(s=>s.equity).filter(v=>v>0);
  if (S.equityChart) S.equityChart.destroy();
  const first=data[0]||0,last=data[data.length-1]||0;
  S.equityChart=drawLineChart(canvas,data,last>=first?'#00d68f':'#f0455a',200);
}

function setEqTF(slice,btn) {
  S.eqTFSlice=slice;
  document.querySelectorAll('.chart-tf-group .tf-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
  renderEquityChart();
}

function renderAnalyticsCharts(trades) {
  const pnlCanvas=document.getElementById('pnl-dist-chart');
  if (pnlCanvas) {
    const pnls=trades.filter(t=>t.realized_pnl!=null).map(t=>t.realized_pnl);
    const ctx=pnlCanvas.getContext('2d');
    const dpr=window.devicePixelRatio||1;
    const W=pnlCanvas.offsetWidth||400,H=180;
    pnlCanvas.width=W*dpr;pnlCanvas.height=H*dpr;ctx.scale(dpr,dpr);
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
    if (pnls.length>0) {
      const min=Math.min(...pnls),max=Math.max(...pnls);
      const bins=20;const binW=(max-min)/bins||1;
      const counts=Array(bins).fill(0);
      pnls.forEach(p=>{const b=Math.min(bins-1,Math.max(0,Math.floor((p-min)/binW)));counts[b]++;});
      const maxC=Math.max(...counts)||1;
      const bw=W/bins;const pad={t:8,b:20};const ih=H-pad.t-pad.b;
      counts.forEach((c,i)=>{
        const v=min+i*binW+binW/2;
        ctx.fillStyle=v>=0?'rgba(0,214,143,0.75)':'rgba(240,69,90,0.75)';
        const bh=(c/maxC)*ih;
        ctx.fillRect(i*bw+1,H-pad.b-bh,bw-2,bh);
      });
      ctx.fillStyle='#4a5878';ctx.font='9px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
      ctx.fillText('PnL Distribution ('+pnls.length+' trades)',W/2,10);
    } else {
      ctx.fillStyle='#4a5878';ctx.font='12px sans-serif';ctx.textAlign='center';
      ctx.fillText('No closed trades',W/2,H/2);
    }
  }

  const cumCanvas=document.getElementById('cumulative-chart');
  if (cumCanvas) {
    const closed=trades.filter(t=>t.realized_pnl!=null).sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.timestamp)-new Date(b.timestamp));
    let cum=0;const cumData=closed.map(t=>{cum+=t.realized_pnl;return cum;});
    drawLineChart(cumCanvas,cumData.length?cumData:[0],cum>=0?'#00d68f':'#f0455a',180);
  }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   LIVE FEED & CONSOLE
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
function addFeedItem(type,badge,msg) {
  const feed=document.getElementById('live-feed');
  if (!feed) return;
  const ts=new Date().toISOString().slice(11,19);
  const item=document.createElement('div');item.className='feed-item';
  item.innerHTML=`<span class="feed-time">${ts}</span><span class="feed-badge ${type}">${badge}</span><span class="feed-msg">${msg}</span>`;
  feed.insertBefore(item,feed.firstChild);
  while(feed.children.length>80)feed.removeChild(feed.lastChild);
}

function addConsole(level,mod,msg) {
  const cons=document.getElementById('bot-console');
  if (!cons) return;
  const ts=new Date().toISOString().slice(11,19);
  const line=document.createElement('div');line.className='console-line';
  const lvlClass={'INFO':'level-info','WARNING':'level-warn','ERROR':'level-error','CRITICAL':'level-crit'}[level]||'level-info';
  const msgClass=msg.toLowerCase().includes('buy')?'buy':msg.toLowerCase().includes('close')||msg.toLowerCase().includes('sell')?'sell':msg.toLowerCase().includes('pnl')&&msg.includes('+')&&!msg.includes('-')?'profit':msg.toLowerCase().includes('gagal')||msg.toLowerCase().includes('error')||msg.toLowerCase().includes('failed')?'loss':'';
  line.innerHTML=`<span class="ts">${ts}</span> <span class="${lvlClass}">[${level}]</span> <span class="mod">${esc(mod||'')}</span> <span class="msg ${msgClass}">${esc(msg.slice(0,200))}</span>`;
  cons.appendChild(line);cons.scrollTop=cons.scrollHeight;
  while(cons.children.length>300)cons.removeChild(cons.firstChild);
}

function clearConsole() { const c=document.getElementById('bot-console');if(c)c.innerHTML=''; }

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   EXTRACT HELPERS
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
function extractProfile(origin) {
  if (!origin) return '';
  const m=origin.match(/Profile\(([^)]+)\)/);return m?m[1]:'';
}
function extractMode(origin) {
  if (!origin) return '';
  const m=origin.match(/Mode\(([^)]+)\)/);return m?m[1]:'';
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   BOT CONTROLS — FIX: Semua pakai apiPost() yang sudah kirim X-API-Key
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
function showPanic() { document.getElementById('panic-modal').classList.add('open'); }
function closePanic(){ document.getElementById('panic-modal').classList.remove('open'); }

async function executePanic() {
  closePanic();
  // Validasi API key sebelum panic
  if (!DASHBOARD_API_KEY) {
    showToast('warn','API Key Diperlukan','Buka Settings dan isi Dashboard API Key terlebih dahulu.');
    return;
  }
  showToast('warn','🆘 PANIC','Menutup semua posisi...');
  addConsole('CRITICAL','api','PANIC BUTTON diaktifkan — menutup semua posisi');
  const r=await apiPost('/bot/panic',{},60000);
  if (r) {
    showToast('sell','🆘 Panic Done','Closed '+r.closed_count+'/'+r.positions_found+' positions. Bot HALTED.');
    addFeedItem('halt','PANIC','Panic close selesai: '+r.closed_count+'/'+r.positions_found+' posisi ditutup. Bot HALTED.');
    if (r.failed_symbols&&r.failed_symbols.length) showToast('warn','⚠️ Failed','Gagal close: '+r.failed_symbols.join(', '));
  } else {
    showToast('warn','⚠️ Error','Panic gagal. Periksa API Key di Settings atau connect ke API.');
  }
  await refreshAll();
}

async function haltBot() {
  if (!DASHBOARD_API_KEY) { showToast('warn','API Key Diperlukan','Buka Settings dan isi Dashboard API Key.'); return; }
  const r=await apiPost('/bot/halt',{reason:'Manual halt from dashboard'});
  if (r){showToast('warn','⏸ Halted','Bot trading dihentikan');addFeedItem('halt','HALT','Bot trading manually halted');}
  else  {showToast('warn','Error','Gagal halt bot');}
  await refreshAll();
}

async function resumeBot() {
  if (!DASHBOARD_API_KEY) { showToast('warn','API Key Diperlukan','Buka Settings dan isi Dashboard API Key.'); return; }
  const r=await apiPost('/bot/resume');
  if (r){showToast('buy','▶ Resumed','Bot trading dilanjutkan');addFeedItem('info','RESUME','Bot trading resumed');}
  else  {showToast('warn','Error','Gagal resume bot');}
  await refreshAll();
}

async function pauseStrategy() {
  if (!DASHBOARD_API_KEY) { showToast('warn','API Key Diperlukan','Buka Settings dan isi Dashboard API Key.'); return; }
  const r=await apiPost('/bot/pause_strategy');
  if (r){showToast('info','⏸ Paused','Strategi di-pause');addFeedItem('warn','PAUSE','Strategy paused');}
}
async function resumeStrategy() {
  if (!DASHBOARD_API_KEY) { showToast('warn','API Key Diperlukan','Buka Settings dan isi Dashboard API Key.'); return; }
  const r=await apiPost('/bot/resume_strategy');
  if (r){showToast('buy','▶ Resume','Strategi aktif kembali');addFeedItem('info','RESUME','Strategy resumed');}
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   TOAST
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
function showToast(type,title,msg,duration=4500) {
  const wrap=document.getElementById('toast-wrap');
  const icons={buy:'📈',sell:'📉',warn:'⚠️',info:'ℹ️'};
  const t=document.createElement('div');t.className='toast '+type;
  t.innerHTML=`<span class="toast-icon">${icons[type]||'ℹ️'}</span><div><div class="toast-title">${esc(title)}</div><div class="toast-msg">${esc(msg)}</div></div><span class="toast-close" onclick="this.parentElement.remove()">✕</span>`;
  wrap.appendChild(t);
  setTimeout(()=>{t.style.opacity='0';t.style.transform='translateX(20px)';t.style.transition='0.3s';setTimeout(()=>t.remove(),300);},duration);
}

window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{
  clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
  resizeTimer=setTimeout(()=>{
    renderEquityChart();
    if (S.page==='analytics') renderAnalyticsCharts(S.trades);
  },200);

async function boot() {
  // Tunjukkan peringatan jika API key belum diset
  if (!DASHBOARD_API_KEY) {
    addConsole('WARNING','main','Dashboard API Key belum diset. Buka Settings untuk mengisi DASHBOARD_API_KEY.');
  }

  setEl('loading-msg','Menghubungkan ke '+API_BASE+'...');
  await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300));
  setEl('loading-msg','Mengambil data portfolio...');
  await refreshAll();
  setEl('loading-msg','Memuat riwayat trade...');
  const tradeData=await apiFetch('/trades?limit=200');
  if (tradeData) S.trades=tradeData.trades||[];
  setEl('loading-msg','Siap!');
  await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,200));

  const lo=document.getElementById('loading-overlay');
  lo.style.opacity='0';lo.style.transition='opacity 0.3s';
  setTimeout(()=>{lo.style.display='none';},300);

  addConsole('INFO','main','AlgoTrader Pro v7.0 Dashboard connected');
  if (S.status) {
    addConsole('INFO','main','Bot: '+(S.status.strategy||'VolumetricBreakout')+' | Mode: '+(S.status.testnet?'TESTNET':'LIVE')+' | Uptime: '+(S.status.uptime_display||'—'));
    addConsole('INFO','risk','MaxDD: '+(S.health?.max_drawdown_pct||15)+'% | DailyLimit: '+(S.health?.daily_loss_limit_pct||10)+'% | Open: '+S.positions.length+' pos');
  }
  addFeedItem('info','SYS','Dashboard connected · <strong>AlgoTrader Pro v7.0</strong>');
  if (S.positions.length) addFeedItem('info','POS',S.positions.length+' open position(s) restored');

  // Tampilkan reminder API key jika belum diset
  if (!DASHBOARD_API_KEY) {
    showToast('warn','Setup Diperlukan','Dashboard API Key belum diset. Buka Settings → Dashboard API Key.',8000);
  }

  S.refreshTimer=setInterval(refreshAll,REFRESH_MS);
}

boot();
</script>
</body>
</html>

--- START OF FILE: indicators/__init__.py ---
"""
indicators/
AlgoTrader Pro v7.0 — Indicator calculation layer.

Semua fungsi di sini adalah pure functions:
  input  → pandas DataFrame (atau nilai numerik)
  output → nilai terukur atau score 0-100

Tidak ada side effect, tidak ada state global, tidak ada I/O.
"""
--- END OF FILE: indicators/__init__.py ---

--- START OF FILE: indicators/patterns.py ---
"""
indicators/patterns.py
AlgoTrader Pro v7.0 — "The Intelligence Pipeline"

"""

from __future__ import annotations

import logging
from typing import List, Optional, Tuple

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

from constants import (
    ENGULFING_MIN_BODY_RATIO,
    ENGULFING_COVERAGE_RATIO,
    HAMMER_LOWER_SHADOW_MULT,
    HAMMER_UPPER_SHADOW_MAX_MULT,
    HAMMER_MIN_BODY_PCT,
    DOJI_MAX_BODY_PCT,
    DOJI_BALANCED_SHADOW_RATIO,
    MARUBOZU_MIN_BODY_PCT,
    PATTERN_NEAR_SUPPORT_PCT,
    PATTERN_NEAR_RESISTANCE_PCT,
    PATTERN_VOLUME_CONFIRM_RATIO,
    PATTERN_BASE_SCORE_ENGULFING,
    PATTERN_BASE_SCORE_HAMMER,
    PATTERN_BASE_SCORE_DOJI,
    PATTERN_BASE_SCORE_MARUBOZU,
    PATTERN_VOLUME_CONFIRM_BONUS,
    PATTERN_CONTEXT_SUPPORT_BONUS,
    PATTERN_HIGHER_TF_ALIGN_BONUS,
    PATTERN_NO_CONFIRM_PENALTY,
    SCORE_NEUTRAL,
)
from core.models import PatternIndicators, PatternType, PatternContext, clamp_score

log = logging.getLogger("indicators.patterns")
_VOLUME_MA_WINDOW = 20
_SWING_LOOKBACK = 20
_DOJI_BODY_THRESHOLD = DOJI_MAX_BODY_PCT

def _candle_components(
    o: float, h: float, l: float, c: float
) -> Tuple[float, float, float, float, bool]:
    total_range  = h - l
    if total_range < 1e-10:
        return 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, True

    body_size    = abs(c - o)
    upper_shadow = h - max(o, c)
    lower_shadow = min(o, c) - l
    is_bullish   = c >= o

    return total_range, body_size, upper_shadow, lower_shadow, is_bullish

def _body_pct(total_range: float, body_size: float) -> float:
    if total_range < 1e-10:
        return 0.0
    return body_size / total_range

def _get_volume_ma(df: pd.DataFrame) -> Optional[float]:
    vol_col = "quote_volume" if "quote_volume" in df.columns else "volume"
    if vol_col not in df.columns:
        return None

    volume = df[vol_col]
    if len(volume) < _VOLUME_MA_WINDOW + 1:
        lookback = volume.iloc[:-1]
    else:
        lookback = volume.iloc[-_VOLUME_MA_WINDOW-1:-1]

    if lookback.empty or lookback.sum() < 1e-9:
        return None

    return float(lookback.mean())

def _is_volume_confirmed(df: pd.DataFrame) -> bool:
    vol_col = "quote_volume" if "quote_volume" in df.columns else "volume"
    if vol_col not in df.columns:
        return False

    current_vol = float(df[vol_col].iloc[-1])
    vol_ma      = _get_volume_ma(df)

    if vol_ma is None or vol_ma < 1e-9:
        return False

    return current_vol >= vol_ma * PATTERN_VOLUME_CONFIRM_RATIO

def get_pattern_context(
    df: pd.DataFrame,
    bb_position: Optional[float] = None,
    bb_lower: Optional[float] = None,
    bb_upper: Optional[float] = None,
    ema_values: Optional[dict] = None,
) -> PatternContext:
    if len(df) < 2:
        return PatternContext.UNKNOWN

    if bb_position is not None:
        try:
            pos = float(bb_position)
            if pos <= 0.10:
                return PatternContext.NEAR_SUPPORT
            if pos >= 0.90:
                return PatternContext.NEAR_RESISTANCE
            return PatternContext.MID_RANGE
        except Exception:
            pass

    close = float(df["close"].iloc[-1])
    if close <= 0:
        return PatternContext.UNKNOWN

    low_arr  = df["low"].values
    high_arr = df["high"].values
    support_levels: List[float] = []

    if bb_lower is not None and bb_lower > 0:
        support_levels.append(bb_lower)

    if ema_values and ema_values.get("ema50"):
        ema50 = float(ema_values["ema50"])
        if ema50 > 0 and ema50 < close:
            support_levels.append(ema50)

    lookback_lows  = low_arr[-_SWING_LOOKBACK-1:-1]
    if len(lookback_lows) > 0:
        swing_low = float(np.min(lookback_lows))
        if swing_low > 0:
            support_levels.append(swing_low)

    resistance_levels: List[float] = []

    if bb_upper is not None and bb_upper > 0:
        resistance_levels.append(bb_upper)

    lookback_highs = high_arr[-_SWING_LOOKBACK-1:-1]
    if len(lookback_highs) > 0:
        swing_high = float(np.max(lookback_highs))
        if swing_high > 0 and swing_high > close:
            resistance_levels.append(swing_high)

    support_threshold    = close * PATTERN_NEAR_SUPPORT_PCT
    resistance_threshold = close * PATTERN_NEAR_RESISTANCE_PCT

    for level in support_levels:
        if abs(close - level) <= support_threshold:
            log.debug("pattern context: NEAR_SUPPORT (close=%.5f level=%.5f)", close, level)
            return PatternContext.NEAR_SUPPORT

    for level in resistance_levels:
        if abs(close - level) <= resistance_threshold:
            log.debug("pattern context: NEAR_RESISTANCE (close=%.5f level=%.5f)", close, level)
            return PatternContext.NEAR_RESISTANCE

    return PatternContext.MID_RANGE

def _detect_engulfing_raw(
    df: pd.DataFrame,
    require_volume_confirmation: bool = True,
    errors: Optional[List[str]] = None,
) -> Tuple[PatternType, float]:
    if errors is None:
        errors = []

    if len(df) < 3:
        errors.append("engulfing: butuh minimal 3 bar (2 konfirmasi + 1 buffer)")
        return PatternType.NONE, 0.0

    bar_curr = df.iloc[-2]
    bar_prev = df.iloc[-3]

    o_curr = float(bar_curr["open"])
    h_curr = float(bar_curr["high"])
    l_curr = float(bar_curr["low"])
    c_curr = float(bar_curr["close"])

    o_prev = float(bar_prev["open"])
    h_prev = float(bar_prev["high"])
    l_prev = float(bar_prev["low"])
    c_prev = float(bar_prev["close"])

    range_curr, body_curr, upper_curr, lower_curr, is_bull_curr = _candle_components(
        o_curr, h_curr, l_curr, c_curr
    )
    range_prev, body_prev, _, _, is_bull_prev = _candle_components(
        o_prev, h_prev, l_prev, c_prev
    )

    if range_curr < 1e-10 or range_prev < 1e-10:
        return PatternType.NONE, 0.0

    body_pct_curr = _body_pct(range_curr, body_curr)

    if body_pct_curr < ENGULFING_MIN_BODY_RATIO:
        return PatternType.NONE, 0.0

    if not is_bull_prev and is_bull_curr:
        if (o_curr <= c_prev and
                c_curr >= o_prev and
                body_curr >= body_prev * ENGULFING_COVERAGE_RATIO):

            quality = min(1.0, body_curr / (range_prev + 1e-10))

            log.debug(
                "BULLISH_ENGULFING detected: quality=%.3f vol_ok=%s",
                quality, _is_volume_confirmed(df),
            )
            return PatternType.BULLISH_ENGULFING, quality

    if is_bull_prev and not is_bull_curr:
        if (o_curr >= c_prev and
                c_curr <= o_prev and
                body_curr >= body_prev * ENGULFING_COVERAGE_RATIO):

            quality = min(1.0, body_curr / (range_prev + 1e-10))

            log.debug(
                "BEARISH_ENGULFING detected: quality=%.3f",
                quality,
            )
